title.en: This time, he had better luck and found a small...

content.en:
"The ancient ruins are really dangerous, with my strength, it's really reluctant to break into there!"

Ye Tian didn't give up, he just lost a copy body, and it didn't have any effect on him.

He continued to copy a replica body, and re-entered the inner perimeter of the primeval ruins.

This time, he had better luck and found a small pile of primeval golden blood.

The primeval golden blood was hidden in a small fragment, and he found it.

"A total of seventy-three drops of primeval golden blood!"

Seeing so much primeval golden blood, Ye Tian was very excited, and after putting away these primeval golden blood, he immediately withdrew from the inner periphery of the primeval ruins and returned to the periphery.

Then, he handed over the primeval golden blood to the replica body on the periphery, and entered the primeval ruins again.

In the years that followed, he continued to roam the inner perimeter of the ancient ruins, and as long as he found the ancient golden blood, he would send it out.

Although he couldn't find the ancient golden blood many times, after his repeated attempts, over the years, he also accumulated a lot of ancient golden blood.

Of course, his duplicate body has also fallen many times, and if it is replaced by other Blood Transformation Realm creatures, he has long since fallen many times.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the deeper position of the primeval ruins, and encountered several primeval demon apes here.

After these primeval demon apes saw Ye Tian, they directly killed them.

"Four Ancient Demon Apes of the Four Blood Transformation Realms!"

Seeing this, Ye Tian directly attacked, and instantly severely injured the four primeval demon apes, but did not kill them.

After all, there were four Ancient Demon Ape with four Blood Transformation Realms here, and there must be more Ancient Demon Ape nearby, if he killed them, he wouldn't want to collect Ancient Golden Blood here.

Immediately, he was ready to leave.

However.

Rumble!!!!

An Ancient Demon Ape of the Six Blood Transformation Realm appeared, and instantly attacked, directly killing Ye Tian.

"The Ancient Demon Ape is too domineering!"

Ye Tian frowned.

However, he instinctively felt as if the primeval demon apes were going to do something deep in the primeval ruins, and those primeval demon apes were just guards.

......

The outside of the ancient ruins.

Ye Tian copied an ordinary three-blooded mutant realm creature, and slowly befriended some of the bloodmutant realm creatures who stayed here.

"I heard that there are quite a few primeval demon apes in the ancient ruins, and it seems that other blood transformation realm creatures are not allowed to approach, what is the situation?" Ye Tian asked casually.

"You don't even know this?It is said that the Ancient Demon Ape sent a lot of clansmen to occupy an area in the depths of the Ancient Ruins and turned it into a territory, and any approaching Blood Transformation Realm Demon Body or us Blood Transformation Realm creatures dare not approach, if they do, they will be killed directly!"

A Blood Transformation Realm creature said.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"Who knows why, we can't get in. Another Blood Transformation Realm creature said, "Anyway, don't get close!"

......

Next, Ye Tian copied the bodies of other Blood Transformation Realm creatures and tried to get close to the area occupied by the Ancient Demon Ape, but they were all killed.

This made Ye Tian even more curious about what the Ancient Demon Ape did.

"Maybe only by copying the body of the primeval demon ape will you not be killed!"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he sent a replica body to the territory where the base camp of the primeval demon ape was located, to find an ancient demon ape with three blood transformation realms.

The base camp of the Ancient Demon Ape was not close to here, and Ye Tian had traveled for a long time before finally arriving at the territory where the Ancient Demon Prison was located.

The Ancient Demon Ape is a top clan whose strength is no less than that of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, and it occupies an ancient treasure land, the Ancient Demon Hell.

Ye Tian couldn't enter the Ancient Demon Prison, so he could only wander around in this territory outside the Ancient Demon Ape.

After searching for a long time, he finally came across an Ancient Demon Ape of the Three Blood Transformation Realm on this day.

"That's you!"

Ye Tian decided.

Airplanes!

With one move, kill it instantly.

However, Ye Tian annihilated the other party's body along with his own body and turned it into ashes.

......

Ancient ruins.

Ye Tian began to copy the body of the Ancient Demon Ape of the Blood Transformation Realm three times, and in a short time, the body of this Ancient Demon Ape was copied.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the depths of the ancient ruins as an ancient demon ape.

Soon, he came to the place where he had fallen, and once again encountered those four Ancient Demon Apes of the Blood Transformation Realm.

"Little guy, you've only been in the Blood Transformation Realm three times, why did you come to the Ancient Ruins?"

A four-time Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Demon Ape asked.

"I'm here to find some treasure!"

Ye Tian said casually.

These primeval demon apes didn't suspect it, and immediately said, "Forget it, you come over to help, and give you a little treasure when the time comes." "

Help?

Ye Tian didn't know what to help.

However, he still followed one of the primeval demon apes into this area, and then went deeper into it, and soon came to a huge fragment.

In the midst of this fragment, a huge beast was sealed in chains.

"Primeval monitor lizard!"

Ye Tian had a feeling that this primeval monitor lizard should be the real primeval race.

At this time, the primeval monitor lizard was torn open a lot, and a large amount of blood flowed out, and then the blood was transported to another place by the primeval demon apes.

At the same time, there were some primeval demon apes that fed the primeval monitor lizard with some treasures.

And.

There are also large arrays arranged here, and the blood of the transported primeval monitor lizards is placed in the large array, and a lot of resources are spent into the large array, as if these blood are conceived and derived.

Abrupt!

A powerful wave swept around.

Then, a large array shattered, and a small lake of gold appeared.

"Hahahaha, it has been a long time since it was conceived, and this first batch of primeval golden blood has finally been successfully conceived!"

An Ancient Demon Ape of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm laughed loudly.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian didn't know what was going on, it was clearly the Ancient Demon Ape who was cultivating the Ancient Golden Blood here.

He knew that the primeval golden blood was the blood of the primeval race, which had been nurtured and transformed through countless years in the ruins of the primeval race.

But now, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan has mastered the method of quickly transforming the Ancient Golden Blood.

How much primeval gold blood must be contained in this small piece of gold lake!

However, at this time, the primeval golden blood was still unstable, so it exploded with energy and shattered the formation, so it still needed a period of time to stabilize.

"The primeval demon ape grabbed an primeval monitor lizard, constantly sucked the other party's blood, and then fed resources to make the primeval monitor lizard recover, so as to give birth to more blood, which is simply treating the other party as an infinitely harvested leek!"

At this moment, Ye Tian had to sympathize with this primeval monitor lizard, as an primeval race, he actually ended up like this.
